lens: Risk-off Monday: the Nasdaq 100 fell ~1.2% and advisory names slid (MS -1.2%, GS -0.9%) into a heavy bank-earnings week (GS/JPM Jul 14, MS Jul 15). But the deal tape is dense with fresh, filing-confirmed mandates — First Hawaiian's all-stock buy of TriCo (Evercore, KBW/Stifel), MTN's $8.50/sh take-private of IHS (JPMorgan), and SoundHound/LivePerson (Lazard, Houlihan Lokey) all advanced in SEC filings today.

stories.headline: Risk-off Monday: Nasdaq 100 slides ~1.2% as tech leads a broad pullback ahead of bank earnings
stories.why_it_matters: US equities opened the week lower — S&P 500 -0.38% (7,546.95), Nasdaq Composite -1.23% (25,958.04), Dow -0.29% (52,482.02) — with tech leading the drop and financials softer (MS -1.24%, JPM -0.82%, GS -0.86%) heading into the Q2 bank-earnings gauntlet. The advisory tape, not the stock tape, is where the deal signal is today.
stories.suggested_action: Frame the week as earnings-driven noise, not a deal slowdown: filing-confirmed mandates kept advancing today. Use the earnings calendar (GS/JPM Jul 14, MS Jul 15) as a reason to check in on pipeline confidence.

stories.headline: Evercore advises First Hawaiian on its all-stock acquisition of TriCo Bancshares ($63.12/sh)
stories.why_it_matters: First Hawaiian (FHB) announced today it will acquire TriCo Bancshares (NASDAQ: TCBK) in an all-stock deal — 2.095 FHB shares per TriCo share, ~$63.12/sh as of FHB's Jul 10 close — creating a leading Pacific banking franchise. Evercore is financial adviser to First Hawaiian; Keefe, Bruyette & Woods (a Stifel company) advises TriCo. A same-day, all-stock bank merger is a full diligence/integration workflow on both sides.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to Evercore's FIG coverage on the First Hawaiian/TriCo mandate — a freshly announced all-stock bank deal spins up two-sided diligence immediately.

deal_clock.event: First Hawaiian announces all-stock acquisition of TriCo Bancshares

stories.headline: KBW (a Stifel company) advises TriCo Bancshares on its sale to First Hawaiian
stories.why_it_matters: On the sell-side of the First Hawaiian/TriCo all-stock merger announced today, Keefe, Bruyette & Woods — A Stifel Company acts as financial adviser to TriCo. KBW/Stifel's FIG franchise is on the target side of a live public bank merger.
stories.suggested_action: Engage Stifel/KBW's FIG team on the TriCo sell-side mandate — target-side diligence and shareholder-vote workflows start now.

deal_clock.event: TriCo agrees to all-stock sale to First Hawaiian; KBW/Stifel advises TriCo

stories.headline: JPMorgan advises IHS Holding board on MTN Group's $8.50/share cash take-private
stories.why_it_matters: IHS Holding (NYSE: IHS) filed tender/merger materials for its acquisition by MTN Group at $8.50 in cash per ordinary share, funded partly by a $1.0B senior unsecured term loan. J.P. Morgan Securities is the board's financial adviser (Latham & Watkins, legal). A cross-border cash take-private of a listed towers company is a heavy, document-intensive process.
stories.suggested_action: Talk to JPMorgan's TMT/telecom-infrastructure coverage on IHS — a cross-border cash take-private with debt financing is a strong diligence/data-room use case.

deal_clock.event: IHS enters merger agreement with MTN Group

stories.source: SEC EDGAR — IHS Holding tender materials (EX-99.(A)(1))

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley advises Real on its acquisition of RE/MAX to form Real REMAX Group
stories.why_it_matters: RE/MAX Holdings (NYSE: RMAX) filed its definitive merger proxy for the combination with The Real Brokerage to create Real REMAX Group — RE/MAX holders can elect 5.150 New Wildlife shares or $13.80 cash (subject to $60-80M aggregate cash proration). Morgan Stanley advises Real (acquirer); J.P. Morgan advises RE/MAX. A cross-border, elect-cash-or-stock merger with two proxies is a complex diligence workflow.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to Morgan Stanley's coverage on the Real/RE/MAX combination — a definitive proxy just posted, and integration diligence is live.

deal_clock.event: Real and RE/MAX sign merger agreement

stories.headline: JPMorgan advises RE/MAX on its sale to Real (definitive proxy filed)
stories.why_it_matters: On the sell-side of the Real/RE/MAX combination, J.P. Morgan Securities is financial adviser to RE/MAX. With the DEFM14A now filed, the shareholder-vote and diligence phase is active on the target side.
stories.suggested_action: Engage JPMorgan on the RE/MAX sell-side — target-side proxy and diligence workflows are underway.

deal_clock.event: RE/MAX DEFM14A filed; JPMorgan advises RE/MAX

stories.headline: BofA Securities advises Element Solutions on its merger; Goldman advises the acquirer
stories.why_it_matters: Element Solutions (NYSE: ESI) filed its merger agreement (EX-2.1): holders receive 0.500 acquirer shares plus $10.00 cash per share. BofA Securities is financial adviser to Element Solutions (target); Goldman Sachs advises the parent/acquirer. A cash-and-stock specialty-chemicals merger with fairness opinions on both sides.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to BofA's chemicals/industrials coverage on Element Solutions — a signed cash-and-stock merger means diligence is live on the target side.

stories.headline: Goldman Sachs advises the acquirer of Element Solutions (cash-and-stock deal)
stories.why_it_matters: In the Element Solutions merger filed Jul 9, Goldman Sachs & Co. is financial adviser to the parent/acquirer, which delivered a fairness opinion on the 0.500-share + $10.00-cash consideration. Buy-side advisory on a specialty-chemicals combination.
stories.suggested_action: Talk to Goldman's chemicals/industrials team on the Element Solutions buy-side — acquirer diligence and financing workflows are active.

deal_clock.event: Element Solutions merger agreement filed; Goldman advises acquirer

stories.headline: Lazard and Houlihan Lokey advise LivePerson on its all-stock merger with SoundHound
stories.why_it_matters: LivePerson (NASDAQ: LPSN) filed its definitive merger proxy for an all-stock combination with SoundHound AI — LivePerson holders receive SoundHound Class A shares. Lazard and Houlihan Lokey advised LivePerson on the deal. An AI-sector all-stock merger with a cross-listed (TASE) shareholder wrinkle.
stories.suggested_action: Engage Lazard's tech/AI coverage on LivePerson/SoundHound — a definitive proxy is filed and the vote/diligence phase is live.

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley advises Simulations Plus on its $18.50/share cash sale
stories.why_it_matters: Simulations Plus (NASDAQ: SLP) filed its preliminary merger proxy (PREM14A): holders receive $18.50 in cash per share. Morgan Stanley is the company's financial adviser and provided the fairness opinion after a process that drew inbound interest from multiple sponsors and strategics. A take-private of a life-sciences software name.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to Morgan Stanley on Simulations Plus — an all-cash take-private with an active sponsor field is a clean data-room use case.

stories.headline: RBC advises Origin Materials as its board pursues strategic alternatives / wind-down
stories.why_it_matters: Origin Materials (NASDAQ: ORGN) filed special-meeting materials disclosing it engaged Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) as strategic and financial adviser to canvass the market for transactions and evaluate strategic alternatives, alongside a possible liquidation distribution of $0.61-$3.54/share. A live strategic-alternatives mandate.
stories.suggested_action: Talk to RBC on Origin Materials — a strategic-alternatives/wind-down process is exactly where controlled diligence access matters.

deal_clock.event: Origin Materials special-meeting materials filed; RBC as strategic adviser

opportunities.headline: Adviser to First Hawaiian on its all-stock acquisition of TriCo Bancshares
opportunities.why_it_matters: Announced today: Evercore advises First Hawaiian on an all-stock buy of TriCo Bancshares (~$63.12/sh). A freshly signed public bank merger triggers two-sided diligence and integration planning immediately.
opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on the First Hawaiian/TriCo announcement — a same-day bank merger is a concrete reason to engage Evercore's FIG team on diligence infrastructure.

outreach_draft.subject: First Hawaiian / TriCo — supporting a live bank merger
outreach_draft.body:
Congratulations on Evercore's role advising First Hawaiian on the TriCo Bancshares combination announced today. All-stock bank mergers spin up two-sided diligence and integration workstreams quickly — would welcome a conversation on how we support clean, auditable data-room access as the process moves toward the shareholder vote.

opportunities.outreach_idea: Engage JPMorgan's telecom-infrastructure coverage on IHS — a cross-border cash take-private with financing is a strong diligence use case.

opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on the Real/RE/MAX combination — a cross-border merger with a fresh definitive proxy is a concrete reason to talk diligence access.

opportunities.headline: Joint lead bookrunner on MDA Space's US$819M raise funding the CLS acquisition
opportunities.why_it_matters: RBC is joint lead bookrunner (with BMO) on MDA Space's upsized US$819M bought deal (July 9), funding a ~€567M cross-border acquisition of France's CLS. A live syndicated ECM execution tied to an acquisition is a strong, current data room use case across the bookrunner group.

deal_clock.event: MDA bought deal upsized to US$819M; RBC joint lead bookrunner

opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on the MDA raise directly — a syndicated bought deal funding a cross-border acquisition is a concrete reason to engage RBC on syndicate-wide diligence access.

opportunities.headline: Financial adviser to Genco on the Diana Shipping hostile tender defense
opportunities.why_it_matters: Jefferies is advising Genco's board (with Morgan Stanley as special adviser) as it rejects Diana's $24.80/share hostile tender, with the offer deadline July 10. Contested tenders are among the most access-sensitive, time-pressured processes — an immediate reason to engage.

deal_clock.event: Genco rejects Diana's tender; Jefferies advising

opportunities.outreach_idea: Lead with the live defense timeline — a hostile tender on a tight clock is an immediate reason to talk secure board-materials and diligence management.

outreach_draft.subject: Genco / Diana — secure diligence for a contested tender
outreach_draft.body:
Noted Jefferies' role advising Genco's board through the Diana tender. Contested tenders concentrate the most sensitive board and diligence materials on a tight clock — would welcome a short conversation on controlled, auditable access while the process is live.

opportunities.why_it_matters: Guggenheim is advising Destination XL's board as it rejects Zodiac's revised $0.84/share unsolicited tender (offer expires July 24). A live take-under defense on a firm clock — a concrete, current touchpoint with an under-covered elite boutique.

deal_clock.event: DXL board reiterates rejection; Guggenheim advising

opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on the active defense and the July 24 deadline — a contested tender is an immediate secure-diligence conversation.

market_snapshot.macro_note: Risk-off open to the week with tech leading lower and financials soft ahead of Q2 bank earnings (GS/JPM Jul 14, MS Jul 15). Intraday levels as of ~12:45 PM EDT Jul 13; Treasury-yield, VIX and boutique-bank quotes omitted where only stale/prior-close data was verifiable — accuracy over completeness.

talking_point.quote: The tape sold off to start the week, but the filing record tells a different story — First Hawaiian/TriCo, IHS/MTN, and SoundHound/LivePerson all advanced in SEC filings today. With your Q2 print landing this week, how are you framing deal momentum versus the market's risk-off read?
talking_point.use_with: M&A and FIG coverage teams (esp. Evercore, JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, Lazard) ahead of Q2 earnings
talking_point.context: Ties the risk-off Monday tape to the dense, filing-confirmed deal flow that actually advanced today — a natural pre-earnings hook (GS/JPM Jul 14, MS Jul 15) on whether the pipeline is steady enough to keep launching processes. Anchors on the day's live Filed mandates.

ranked.read: Leading the tape today — First Hawaiian's all-stock buy of TriCo (Evercore, KBW/Stifel) headlines a busy bank-M&A week into Q2 earnings.
IHS Holding's $8.50/sh take-private by MTN (JPMorgan) and SoundHound/LivePerson (Lazard, Houlihan Lokey) keep tech/telecom deal flow dense.
Real/RE/MAX (Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan) definitive proxy filed — a cross-border, tech-enabled brokerage combination.
Element Solutions cash-and-stock merger (BofA target-side, Goldman buy-side) signed and filed.
ranked.source_note: SEC EDGAR Element Solutions EX-2.1, Jul 9 2026

pipeline_watch.note: Named covered-bank mandates and sector heat. Rumored / no-adviser situations live in the Rumor Mill.

skeptics_corner.note: Unconfirmed leads — rumored deals and situations with no adviser named yet. Real reporting, but treat as speculative: chase them, don't quote them on a call.
